title: Squirrel Removal in Westbury, Long Island | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Westbury, Long Island. Humane extraction, damage repair & prevention. Licensed experts serving Westbury homes & businesses. Call today!
intro: Squirrels invading your Westbury attic or commercial property? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Westbury and surrounding Long Island communities. Our experienced technicians use humane, effective methods to safely remove squirrels and prevent future infestations in your home or business.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Westbury residents and businesses for years with reliable, licensed squirrel removal services. Our team understands the unique challenges of Long Island properties, from historic homes near the Old Westbury Gardens to modern commercial buildings along Old Country Road, and we provide customized solutions with guaranteed results.
localContext: Westbury's tree-lined residential neighborhoods and proximity to wooded areas make it particularly susceptible to squirrel activity, especially during fall and winter months when these animals seek warm shelter. Properties near the LIRR Westbury station, around Post Avenue, and in the Clark Gardens area frequently experience squirrel intrusions in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Westbury?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Westbury typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, extent of damage, and necessary exclusion work. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Westbury home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Westbury residents. The removal process typically takes 1-3 days for trapping and extraction, followed by exclusion work to seal entry points. Complex cases involving large colonies or extensive damage may require additional time.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane and legal in Westbury?
faqs.answer: Yes, we follow all New York State and Nassau County regulations for humane wildlife removal. Our methods prioritize the safe, live capture and relocation of squirrels when possible, and we never use harmful poisons or inhumane traps that could endanger your family or pets.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause to Westbury homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can cause significant damage to Westbury properties by chewing through electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), damaging insulation, gnawing on wooden beams and siding, blocking gutters and vents, and leaving droppings that pose health risks. Early removal prevents costly repairs and protects your property value.
